feedback.text: I would like to add so called "loot boxes" in games into this act, or rather forbidding them like Belgium has done. Also using ingame virtual currencies to manipulate players to spend more than they want. And lastly the "800% value" advertisement or similiar things in those games to trigger players bad spending habits. Seperate to that i want this Digital Fairness Act to stop Payment Processors like VIsa and Mastercard to block legal games on platforms like Steam after beeing pushed by interest groups.
